game.name: Super Blood Hockey
game.desc: Relive the golden age of arcade sports gaming with Super Blood Hockey — a violent homage to classic 8-bit and 16-bit ice hockey games. Create and manage your team in a dystopic world of no-rules, fast-paced, arcade-style ice hockey action. Adjust training regimens, control diets, administer black market pharmaceuticals, and provide healthcare (or not) to a ragtag team of convicts at the mercy of your underhanded tactics. Paint the ice with the blood of your friends in 4-player local multiplayer, take on the world in global tournaments, or conquer challenge modes with absurd scenarios like 12 vs 12 Mega Rumble.
